overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in wizard robes exploring a gothic castle interior, descending stairs through stone corridors, examining magical hourglass structures, and entering a grand dining hall with floating candles and students at long tables.

events.description: character begins descending the stone staircase
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide stone staircase into a gothic corridor, passing ornate railings

entered.detail: large ornate pointed arch with intricate stone carvings framing the corridor entrance
wide worn stone steps descending between carved balustrades
dark wooden balustrade with gothic tracery patterns
vertical stained glass window allowing natural light to stream in

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the top of a grand stone staircase within a gothic castle. The character descends the worn marble steps, passing ornate wooden railings, and approaches a large carved archway leading into a corridor where other students are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: house points chamber with magical hourglasses

events.description: enters the chamber containing the large magical hourglasses
slows down to observe the hourglass structures

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the chamber, observing the large magical hourglasses representing the school houses

notable_agents.action: student standing near the silver hourglass observing the green sand
group of students conversing near the golden hourglass

entered.detail: tall silver hourglass with serpent design containing green sand
blue and gold hourglass with eagle motifs containing bronze sand
golden hourglass with lion design containing red sand
stone wall-mounted shields with house crests

segments.scene_description: The character enters a high-ceilinged chamber housing four massive magical hourglasses representing the school houses, each with distinct colors and animal motifs. Students mill about observing the sand levels while the camera moves slowly past the silver serpent and blue eagle hourglasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of the house points chamber with wall braziers

events.description: character takes out wand and interacts with a wall-mounted object
turns around and begins walking back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: taking out a wand to interact with a wall sconce, then turning to leave the chamber

notable_agents.action: student walking past the camera toward the hourglasses

entered.detail: iron torch holder with magical blue flame
heavy oak door with iron hinges and gothic carvings

segments.scene_description: In the corner of the hourglass chamber, the character interacts with a magical wall brazier using a wand, then turns to exit. The golden lion hourglass shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera turns away from the center of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor leading to great hall entrance

events.description: approaches and opens the large wooden doors to the Great Hall

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward the massive wooden doors of the Great Hall

entered.detail: massive double doors of dark carved wood with iron handles and crests

segments.scene_description: The character walks back through the stone corridor, passing the carved wooden door from earlier, and approaches the imposing entrance doors to the Great Hall. The camera moves steadily forward as the large wooden doors loom ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

events.description: enters the Great Hall revealing the floating candles and dining tables
slows down to observe the food on the nearby tables

agents.ego_description: walking down the central aisle of the Great Hall, observing the floating candles and students dining at the long tables

notable_agents.action: student sitting at the table eating from a plate
students gathered at the far end of the hall near the faculty table

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air throughout the high ceiling
long wooden benches and tables laden with food and drink
tall gothic stained glass windows at the far end of the hall
large hanging banners representing the school houses

segments.scene_description: The character enters the magnificent Great Hall, revealing a vast space with hundreds of floating candles illuminating the room. Long dining tables stretch down the hall filled with students eating, while house banners hang from the walls and light streams through massive stained glass windows at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded stone corridors of a gothic castle into the expansive brilliance of a grand dining hall. It begins at the top of a grand staircase, descending worn marble steps and passing through a carved archway into a corridor where students gather. As the camera enters a high-ceilinged chamber, the scene shifts to focus on four massive, colorful magical hourglasses before the character pauses to interact with a wall brazier using a wand. The camera then turns away from the golden lion hourglass to retrace its steps through the stone corridor, moving steadily toward a set of imposing wooden doors. Finally, the view expands as the doors open to reveal the magnificent Great Hall, where hundreds of floating candles illuminate long tables of students and light streams through distant stained glass windows.
